text: Tell me about a time you led a team through a difficult or ambiguous project.
Describe a situation where you had to make a tough decision without full information. What was your process?
Give an example of a time you influenced people who did not directly report to you.
Tell me about a time you had to rally a team that was losing motivation. What did you do?
Describe a time you disagreed with your manager. How did you handle it?
Tell me about a situation where two team members were in conflict. How did you resolve it?
Give an example of a time you received critical feedback you initially disagreed with. What did you do?
Describe a time you had to push back on a stakeholder request. How did you approach that conversation?
Tell me about a project or initiative that failed. What happened and what did you learn?
Describe a time you missed a deadline or an important goal. What was your response?
Give an example of a mistake you made that had a significant impact. How did you recover?
Tell me about a time your assumptions turned out to be wrong. How did you adapt?
Describe a time you worked with a difficult colleague to accomplish a shared goal.
Tell me about a time you went above and beyond to help a teammate succeed.
Give an example of a time you had to adapt your communication style to work effectively with someone very different from you.
Describe a situation where you had to coordinate across multiple teams or departments. What challenges did you face?
Tell me about the project you are most proud of. What was the outcome and why does it matter?
Describe a time you identified and solved a problem nobody else had noticed. What was the result?
Give an example of a time you improved a process or system. How did you measure success?
Tell me about a time you delivered results under significant constraints (time, budget, resources).
Design a URL shortener like bit.ly. Walk me through your architecture decisions and trade-offs.
How would you design a rate limiter for a public API? What data structures and algorithms would you use?
Design a notification service that can send push, email, and SMS alerts at scale. What are the main challenges?
How would you design a distributed cache? Walk through consistency, eviction, and fault tolerance.
Describe a production bug you debugged that was particularly challenging. What was your process for finding and fixing it?
Tell me about a time a performance issue appeared in production. How did you identify the root cause and resolve it?
Tell me about a significant technical decision you made on a past project. What were the alternatives you considered?
Describe a time you had to refactor a large codebase or legacy system. How did you approach it without breaking things?
Walk me through your most recent role. What were your core responsibilities and biggest accomplishments?
Tell me about a project on your resume you are most proud of. What was your specific contribution?
I see a gap or transition in your resume. Can you walk me through what happened and what you took away from that period?
You listed a specific skill or technology on your resume. Tell me about a time you used it to solve a real problem.
